inputs.current_state: Cash position: $12,400 in account, monthly burn $8,200. Pipeline: $94,000 across 8 deals (2 in negotiation worth $37,000). Active campaigns: 3 outreach sequences, 1 content funnel. Conversion rates: lead-to-close 6.2 percent overall, fastest close cycle was 7 days (referral). Channels with revenue: LinkedIn outreach ($8,500), content inbound ($14,000), referrals ($6,000). Runway: approximately 6 weeks at current burn without new revenue.
